text: This article discusses fleet management practices relevant to logistics operations, including vehicle maintenance scheduling, route optimization, driver behavior, fuel usage monitoring, compliance, and operational efficiency. It aligns with the RS by covering maintenance planning, vehicle utilization, dispatch visibility, and data-driven decision making for fleet managers.
title: Top 20 Essential Fleet Management Strategies for Maximum Efficiency and Safety

text: This page describes real-time vehicle scheduling for logistics environments. It focuses on dynamic rescheduling of vehicle and driver assignments, automated dispatching, routing, handling last-minute orders, and integration with GPS and order systems. These topics map well to the RS requirements around scheduling, availability, dispatch updates, and route changes.
title: Real-time Vehicle Scheduling

text: This article explains vehicle utilization in delivery and field-service fleets. It covers time-based, mileage-based, and capacity-based utilization, route planning impact, workload balancing, preventive maintenance, and right-sizing fleets. It is relevant to the RS reporting and operational efficiency requirements.
title: Vehicle Utilization: Formula, Metrics, and How to Improve It
